title: Country Code Crosswalk (replace_ccode_country.do)
abstract: A Stata do-file that maps country-name spelling variants — including historical aliases, alternate spellings, abbreviations, and transliterations — to standardized numeric country codes from the COW (Correlates of War), Polity IV/V, and Gleditsch-Ward state-system coding conventions. Maintained and updated incrementally as new spelling variants are encountered in new datasets. As of 2022-05-25, incorporates names from the World Bank WDI, UN Statistics Division, Polity, Penn World Tables, UCDP, ICOW, and several contributor datasets.
methodology_summary: Manually maintained Stata do-file. Three sections: (1) COW ccode assignments by country-name string match; (2) Polity ccode overrides for countries where Polity diverges from COW — both country-name-based and year-conditional ccode-based rules; (3) G&W ccode overrides — primarily year-conditional ccode-based rules, with minimal country-name-based rules. Updated by the author each time a new spelling variant or dataset is encountered. Contributions from multiple political science researchers acknowledged in file comments.
key_limitations: Coverage reflects datasets the author has worked with; obscure or newly independent states may be missing. Polity and G&W divergences are incomplete for older historical periods. ISO3 enrichment in this PAX is best-effort only (static COW→ISO3 lookup) and is not authoritative — users requiring authoritative ISO3 mapping should consult the ISO 3166 Maintenance Agency directly. Year-conditional G&W and Polity divergences (e.g., Germany pre/post-reunification, Vietnam, Yugoslavia successor states) cannot be fully captured in a flat crosswalk without a year column; see EDGE_CASES.md.
population_description: ~200 sovereign states and dependencies, all coding periods, with emphasis on post-1945 country-name conventions used in political science datasets
update_history: 2012-03-05: World Bank WDI country names (Leah Windsor, Ole Miss)
2015-05-21: Polity update spellings (Peter White, U Maryland)
2015-09-08: Penn World Tables (Curtis Bell, One Earth Future)
2016-02-08: Penn World Tables additional (Joeri Smits, NADEL)
2017-01-26: James et al. 2012 GDP time series dataset
2020-10-13: North Macedonia replacing Macedonia (Holly Hansen, OSU)
2022-05-25: UCDP country names (Baylee Harrell, U Kentucky)
